feed.title: Australian Merger Tracker

entry.title: Sembcorp Industries Ltd - Alinta Energy: In accordance with s 51ABZ of the Competition and Consumer Act 2010, the ACCC decided that the notification filed on 11 February 2026 should be taken not to have an effective notification date because it is materially incomplete and materially misleading.
entry.id: https://mergers.fyi/mergers/MN-95001#2026-03-12T12:00:00Z-In accordance with s 51ABZ of the Competition and
entry.summary: Merger: Sembcorp Industries Ltd - Alinta Energy (MN-95001). Event: In accordance with s 51ABZ of the Competition and Consumer Act 2010, the ACCC decided that the notification filed on 11 February 2026 should be taken not to have an effective notification date because it is materially incomplete and materially misleading..
